problem_title: Onboarding delays increase with complex corporate risk
problem_description: High-risk corporate onboarding workflows often rely on fragmented checks from multiple providers, causing slow manual reviews and inconsistent risk assessments. Compliance teams struggle to maintain a clear audit trail and trace decisions amid disconnected KYC, KYB, sanctions screening and case management data.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates identity and corporate verification results with sanctions and adverse media data into one structured onboarding workflow, enabling risk-based routing, consistent decisions and a clear audit trail for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to risk-based approval
workflow_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider results with screening and risk rules to route high-risk corporate cases through layered review and decision workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for high-risk corporate onboarding?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures high-risk corporate onboarding by connecting KYC, KYB, sanctions and screening outputs into risk-based workflows, cases and audit trails for regulated digital asset businesses like VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage onboarding review workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies configurable internal rules to route, escalate and document onboarding checks and reviews, creating explainable and auditable cases for compliance teams to handle corporate client risk efficiently.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding decision evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding decisions, supporting audit-ready evidence by recording case history, decision logs, reviewer actions and linked provider outputs within a controlled compliance workflow.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC and KYB providers, connecting their outputs into connected workflows without requiring replacement or disruption of current provider integrations.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace providers in compliance workflows?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC, KYB or screening providers but instead connects their outputs into one operational compliance layer with structured evidence and decision management.
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC, KYB, sanctions and risk data into controlled cases and audit-ready onboarding evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
